TextView.android:text:
Your privacy is important to us.
The Mood Journal App is designed to help users track moods and write personal journal entries.
Data Storage All data including journal entries, mood records, and profile information are stored locally on your device.
Personal Information The app only stores the information you provide such as name, username, and avatar to personalize your experience.
Security Your data remains on your device and is protected by the password you set during account creation.
Third-Party Access The Mood Journal App does not share your personal data with any third-party services.
Policy Updates This privacy policy may be updated in future versions of the app.
